headline: HONEYWELL AND NATIONAL HOCKEY LEAGUE PARTNER TO DRIVE A NEW ERA OF INTELLIGENT, DIGITALLY ENABLED VENUES
summary: Honeywell (NASDAQ: HON) and the National Hockey League (NHL) today announced a new multi‑year global partnership naming Honeywell the Official Building Automation and Energy Management Partner of the NHL.
